title: Command Cockpit Stage Event Ribbon
summary: Added a compact event ribbon inside the selected lane stage so recent events, proof, gates, and next move stay visible without adding another scrolling report stack.
changes: Derived event, proof, gate, and next-move cells from each lane's trail, evidence, blockers, service requests, and next action.
Mounted the ribbon inside the Command Cockpit Overview stage with a sweep runner and compact sticky behavior.
Contained the ribbon horizontally on narrow screens so long lane text does not create page overflow.
